rationale: The candidate 913a1732bc2912be1c904925a56d92fcf3dae24d is excellent. It captures the playful tone of the original ('Sinfonía de la Destrucción') and maintains all technical code blocks and MDX components correctly. The typo mentioned in the previous judge report ('dedesestructuración') is actually not present in the provided MDX text for this candidate (it correctly says 'Delicias de la desestructuración'), so no suggestions are needed.

suggestionLog.reason: Typo in the title: 'dedesestructuración' should be 'de la desestructuración'.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
